title: Add retry utility with exponential backoff
description: Add a retry utility function at src/utils/retry.ts that retries an async function N times with exponential backoff, with tests at src/utils/retry.test.ts. The implementation includes exponential backoff with configurable initialDelay, backoffFactor, and maxDelay, retry count via maxRetries option, selective retrying via shouldRetry predicate, and 8 comprehensive tests covering success, retries, backoff timing, max delay capping, and error handling.
